title: xanthoxalis pilosa
intro: Xanthoxalis pilosa, also known as the hairy wood sorrel or creeping wood sorrel, is a perennial herb native to Europe, North Africa, and Western Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Xanthoxalis pilosa include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional remedies.
